title: TBench visible verifier contract
prompt: FAKE_TBENCH_VISIBLE_VERIFIER_CONTRACT: inspect the visible verifier constants and write the exact required result.

commandChecks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'

assert Path('result.txt').read_text() == expected + '\n'
PY
